IRS990EZ.PrimaryExemptPurposeTxt: LOURDES FOUNDATION WAS ORGANIZED FOR THE BENEFIT OF, TO PERFORM THE FUNCTIONS OF, AND TO CARRY OUT THE PURPOSES OF ASCENSION SPONSOR AND SUCH OTHER OF ITS SUBSIDIARY ORGANIZATIONS THAT QUALIFY UNDER SECTION 501(C)(3) AND UNDER SECTION 509(A)(1) OR SECTION 509(A)(2) OF THE CODE, BY AND THROUGH ASCENSION AND ASCENSION HEALTH.

ProgramSrvcAccomplishmentGrp.DescriptionProgramSrvcAccomTxt: LOURDES FOUNDATION DID NOT HAVE ANY PROGRAM SERVICE ACCOMPLISHMENTS THIS TAX YEAR.

Form990ScheduleAPartVIGrp.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Schedule A, Part IV, Section A, Line 1 Supported Orgs Listed By Name
Form990ScheduleAPartVIGrp.ExplanationTxt: THE CORPORATION IS ORGANIZED AND AT ALL TIMES SHALL BE OPERATED EXCLUSIVELY FOR THE BENEFIT OF, TO PERFORM THE FUNCTIONS OF, AND TO CARRY OUT THE PURPOSES OF ASCENSION SPONSOR AND SUCH OTHER OF ITS SUBSIDIARY ORGANIZATIONS THAT QUALIFY UNDER SECTION 501(C)(3) AND UNDER SECTION 509(A)(1) OR SECTION 509(A)(2) OF THE INTERNAL REVENUE CODE. THE CORPORATION'S PURPOSES SHALL BE CONSISTENT WITH AND SUPPORTIVE OF THE CORPORATE PURPOSES OF ASCENSION HEALTH AND ASCENSION HEALTH ALLIANCE. IN ADDITION TO THE LISTED QUALIFYING SUPPORTED ORGANIZATION WITH WHICH THE FILING ORGANIZATION HAS A HISTORICAL RELATIONSHIP, THE FILING ORGANIZATION ALSO HAS A SUPPORTING ORGANIZATION RELATIONSHIP WITH THE ASCENSION RELIGIOUS SPONSOR AND ASCENSION FOUNDING RELIGIOUS SPONSORS, BY AND THROUGH ASCENSION HEALTH ALLIANCE.

Form990ScheduleAPartVIGrp.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Schedule A, Part IV, Section A, Line 2 Supported Org. Without IRS Status 509(a)1 or (2)
Form990ScheduleAPartVIGrp.ExplanationTxt: SUPPORTED ORGANIZATIONS NOT REQUIRED TO OBTAIN A SEPARATE IRS DETERMINATION OF STATUS ARE EITHER CONSIDERED AN INSTRUMENTALITY OF THE CATHOLIC CHURCH OR ARE INCLUDED IN THE OFFICIAL CATHOLIC DIRECTORY AND HAVE BEEN VERIFIED TO BE DESCRIBED IN EITHER 509(A)(1) OR 509(A)(2) ACCORDING TO THEIR MOST RECENT FORM 990 FILING.

Form990ScheduleAPartVIGrp.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Schedule A, Part IV, Section A, Line 5a Added, Substituted, or Removed Sup. Org.
Form990ScheduleAPartVIGrp.ExplanationTxt: THE ORGANIZATION REMOVED SUPPORTED ORGANIZATIONS, AS FOLLOWS: ASCENSION ALLEGAN PROFESSIONAL HEALTH SERVICES, INC., EIN 20-5800012, STATUS CHANGED TO SUPPORTING ORGANIZATION IN FY21 ASCENSION MICHIGAN, EIN 38-2631907, STATUS CHANGED TO SUPPORTING ORGANIZATION IN FY21 FIELD NEUROSCIENCES INSTITUTE, EIN 38-2790703, STATUS CHANGED TO SUPPORTING ORGANIZATION IN FY21 ASCENSION TEXAS HEART & VASCULAR, F/K/A HEALTHCARE COLLABORATIVE, EIN 27-3220767, STATUS CHANGED TO SUPPORTING ORGANIZATION IN FY21 OUR LADY OF LOURDES HOSPITAL AT PASCO, EIN 91-0349750, STATUS CHANGED TO SUPPORTING ORGANIZATION IN FY21 PRIMARY PHYSICIAN NETWORK, LLC, EIN 20-8775914, STATUS CHANGED TO SUPPORTING ORGANIZATION IN FY21 ST. JOHN HEALTH SYSTEM FOUNDATION, INC., EIN 73-1133139, STATUS CHANGED TO SUPPORTING ORGANIZATION IN FY21. ST. JOHN VILLAS, INC. EIN 73-1077367, FILED FINAL RETURN IN TAX YEAR 2019 ST. VINCENT'S SPECIAL NEEDS CENTER, INC., EIN 06-0702617, MEMBER TRANSFER TO HARTFORD HEALTHCARE EFFECTIVE 09/30/19 (III)/(IV) THE ORGANIZING/GOVERNING DOCUMENTS OF THE ORGANIZATION PROVIDE THAT THE ORGANIZATION IS ORGANIZED AND AT ALL TIMES SHALL BE OPERATED EXCLUSIVELY FOR THE BENEFIT OF, TO PERFORM THE FUNCTIONS OF, AND TO CARRY OUT THE PURPOSES OF THE ASCENSION AND FOUNDING RELIGIOUS SPONSORS, IN SUPPORT OF THOSE ORGANIZATIONS AND AFFILIATED ORGANIZATIONS CLASSIFIED AS PUBLIC CHARITIES UNDER SECTIONS 509(A)(1) OR 509(A)(2) OF THE CODE. THAT DIRECTION PROVIDES THE AUTHORITY FOR THE CHANGES DESCRIBED ABOVE, WHICH WERE ACCOMPLISHED ACCORDING TO THE FORM OF TRANSACTION THAT EITHER ADDED THE ORGANIZATION TO THE ASCENSION SYSTEM OR CAUSED ITS REMOVAL OR ANY CHANGES THAT AFFECT AN ENTITY'S REPORTING STATUS FOR THIS PURPOSE.
